summary: Comprehensive testing of portfolio tracker app with multi-portfolio support. All backend APIs (33 tests) and frontend flows passed successfully. New schema with portfolio_id integration verified.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning - TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Use Pressable.
react_native_issues.note: Does not affect functionality, cosmetic warning only

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings for shadow* style props. Should use boxShadow.
react_native_issues.note: Does not affect functionality, cosmetic warning only

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All holdings now include portfolio_id field (new schema migration successful)
✅ MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
✅ All endpoints validate portfolio_id exists before creating holdings
✅ Portfolio deletion cascades to holdings (line 136 server.py)
✅ Cannot delete last portfolio (proper validation at line 130-132)
✅ CSV import supports multiple column name variations
✅ React Native components used properly throughout
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ Async/await used properly for all DB/API operations
seed_data_creation: MongoDB seeded with 1 portfolio ('My Portfolio') and 7 holdings (AAPL, QQQ, TSLA, MSFT, GOOGL, CRWD, SOXQ) - all with portfolio_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: All portfolio CRUD endpoints working. New schema with portfolio_id fully integrated. CSV import tested with multiple formats. Frontend UI flows all working. yfinance integration for live prices operational.

tests: GET /api/portfolios returns portfolios list with 'My Portfolio'
GET /api/holdings returns all holdings with portfolio_id field
POST /api/holdings requires valid portfolio_id (404 if invalid)
Holdings persist after creation (verified with GET)
Holdings removed after deletion (verified with GET)
Import CSV with standard columns (Symbol, Shares, Avg Price)
Import CSV with alternative columns (Ticker, Quantity, Cost)
Handle whitespace and dollar signs in CSV
Skip invalid rows, import only valid ones
GET /api/stocks/quotes with empty symbols returns empty

dashboard.portfolio_tabs: ✅ All and My Portfolio tabs visible and clickable
dashboard.portfolio_summary: ✅ Total value, all-time gain/loss, today gain/loss displayed
dashboard.holdings_list: ✅ 7 stocks displayed with live prices and metrics
dashboard.stock_cards: ✅ Cards show symbol, shares, price, day change, value, avg cost, total G/L, return
dashboard.portfolio_filtering: ✅ Clicking tabs filters holdings by portfolio

navigation.manage_portfolios_btn: ✅ Layers icon navigates to portfolios page
navigation.import_csv_btn: ✅ Upload icon navigates to import CSV page
navigation.fab_add_btn: ✅ FAB + button navigates to add holding page
navigation.stock_card_click: ✅ Clicking stock card navigates to detail page

manage_portfolios_page.create_input: ✅ Input field for new portfolio name
manage_portfolios_page.portfolio_list: ✅ List of portfolios with rename/delete actions

import_csv_page.brokerage_tips: ✅ Wealthsimple, Fidelity, Schwab, etc. export tips
import_csv_page.portfolio_selector: ✅ Radio buttons to select target portfolio

add_holding_page.form_inputs: ✅ Symbol, shares, avg price inputs all present

stock_detail_page.price_display: ✅ Current price and day change displayed
stock_detail_page.position_details: ✅ Shares, avg cost, cost basis, current value, total G/L, return
stock_detail_page.market_data: ✅ Previous close, day high, day low, market cap
stock_detail_page.edit_button: ✅ Edit icon navigates to edit form
